theorem: Established grounding: the only outside inclusions are proven daily-use theorems; the origin is Lucas' theorem (1878), the idempotent AND-submask base dual to OR; the only addition is the verified chart->J3(O) connection (T3)
closes_gap: the operator's single remaining gap — tying the existing proven theorem + citation that makes all continuation work a restatement of established math, newly connected, idempotent to one other thing, as the only outside input
origin_theorem: Lucas' theorem (1878) — the idempotent AND-submask base

the_only_addition.name: chart -> J3(O) isomorphism (Theorem T3)
the_only_addition.claim: the Rule 30 local (L,C,R) state IS a J3(O) diagonal element; shell=2 IS the trace-2 idempotent stratum; the Weyl L<->R is the (1,3) transposition
the_only_addition.nature: this is the only new thing — a CONNECTION between established fields, not new mathematics within any of them

Lucas_1878.theorem: Lucas' theorem: C(m,n) = prod C(m_i,n_i) mod p over base-p digits
Lucas_1878.role: WHAT STARTED IT ALL — the closed form, the AND-submask idempotent base

Kummer_1852.theorem: Kummer's theorem: the p-adic valuation of C(m,n) counts carries
Kummer_1852.role: the carry structure that makes the correction Lucas-sparse

Boole_DeMorgan.theorem: Boolean algebra: AND and OR are idempotent and De Morgan dual
Boole_DeMorgan.daily_use: all of logic, computing, set theory
Boole_DeMorgan.instantiated_by: AND (submask/correction) dual to OR (Rule 30) — the idempotent pair
Boole_DeMorgan.role: the idempotent-to-one-other-thing dual pair grounding all bit ops

SteinhausThreeGap_1958.theorem: Three-gap (Steinhaus) theorem: {k.alpha mod 1} has <=3 gap lengths

CRT_Sunzi.theorem: Chinese Remainder Theorem: ring iso Z/mn = Z/m x Z/n for coprime m,n
CRT_Sunzi.daily_use: cryptography, signal processing, all of computing

JordanVNW_1934.theorem: Exceptional Jordan algebra J3(O), Peirce idempotent decomposition
JordanVNW_1934.author_year: Jordan, von Neumann, Wigner 1934; Jacobson; Albert
JordanVNW_1934.instantiated_by: chart = J3(O) diagonal; shell-2 = trace-2 idempotent stratum (T2,T3)
JordanVNW_1934.role: the idempotent normal form the chart connects to

ConwaySloane_1988.theorem: E8 / Leech lattices, Construction A, root systems
ConwaySloane_1988.daily_use: coding theory, sphere packing, lattice cryptography

Golay_1949.theorem: Extended binary Golay code [24,12,8], Steiner system S(5,8,24)

ConwayNorton_1979.theorem: Monstrous Moonshine: McKay-Thompson series T_g, genus-zero
ConwayNorton_1979.daily_use: VOA / conformal field theory, string theory

honesty: The framework restates established theorems and adds one verified connection (T3). It does NOT extend exceptional Lie/Jordan/lattice/moonshine theory (OPEN_OBLIGATIONS O10).
